zh.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.Castle Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當William FitzHugh於大約1399年出生在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯時，他的父親Sir Henry FitzHugh43歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Grey37歲。他於1420年與Lady Margaret Willoughby在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1452年10月22日在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國越可爾拉文斯沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William FitzHugh于大约1399年出生在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯时，他的父亲Sir Henry FitzHugh43岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Grey37岁。他于1420年与Lady Margaret Willoughby在英国英格兰越可爾拉文斯沃斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1452年10月22日在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国越可爾拉文斯沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: FitzHugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William FitzHugh was born about 1399, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Henry FitzHugh, was 43 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Grey, was 37. He married Lady Margaret Willoughby in 1420, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 7 daughters. He died on 22 October 1452, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William FitzHugh est né environ 1399, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry FitzHugh, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Grey, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Willoughby en 1420, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 22 octobre 1452, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William FitzHugh um 1399 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry FitzHugh 43 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Grey 37. Er hat 1420 in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Willoughby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 22. Oktober 1452 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzHugh è nato il circa 1399 nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry FitzHugh, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Grey, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Willoughby nel 1420, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 7 figlie. Morì il 22 ottobre 1452, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William FitzHughが約1399年にイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで生まれた時，父Sir Henry FitzHughは43歳，母Lady Elizabeth Greyは37歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスでLady Margaret Willoughbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1452年10月22日に故郷で54歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William FitzHugh(이)가 대략 1399년 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry FitzHugh(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Grey(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 Lady Margaret Willoughby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1452년 10월 22일 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William FitzHugh nasceu aproximadamente 1399, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry FitzHugh, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Grey, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Willoughby em 1420, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1452, em sua cidade natal, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William FitzHugh родился около 1399 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry FitzHugh было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Grey, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Willoughby в 1420 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 7 дочерей. Он умер 22 октября 1452 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William FitzHugh nació aproximadamente 1399, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry FitzHugh, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Grey, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Willoughby en 1420, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 7 hijas. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1452, en su pueblo, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
